headline: How Verizon (VZ) Story Is Shifting As Cost Cuts Progress And Transparency Concerns Grow
summary: Verizon Communications has seen its fair value price target move from US$50.76 to US$51.17, a subtle shift that still matters if you are tracking the story closely. This change comes as analysts split between highlighting progress on subscribers and cost cuts, and raising concerns about transparency, disclosures and competitive pressure. Read on to see how these views are shaping the evolving Verizon narrative and how you can keep track of the moving parts. Stay updated as the Fair Value for...

headline: How Investors May Respond To Verizon (VZ) Resisting Activist Push On Governance, ESG Pay, And Climate Oversight
summary: On April 6, 2026, Verizon Communications filed a definitive proxy statement urging shareholders to vote against three activist proposals on splitting the CEO and chair roles, scrutinizing ESG and DEI links to pay, and increasing climate-related board oversight, ahead of its May 21, 2026 annual meeting. These contested proposals highlight growing tension among Verizon investors over governance structure, climate risk disclosure, and the role of ESG and DEI metrics in executive...
